HYO-TEC (2022)

Fondateur / Founder

Adresse / Address

contact@hyo-tec.com
Route de Tunis Km 10 Technopole de Sfax 3021
Activité 
Conception, 
fabrication 
et 
vente 
des 
électrolyseurs; Conception, fabrication et vente des 
machines 
génératrices 
d’oxygène 
et 
d’hydrogène; 
Conception, fabrication et vente des piles à combustibles; 
Conception, fabrication et vente des solutions de 
stockage d’énergie renouvelable; Service d’installation, 
assistance, formation, et conception personnalisée des 
systèmes de production et conversion d’hydrogène et 
oxygène.
Aspect Technologique Il s’agit de concevoir, fabriquer et 
vendre toute les composants des systèmes de conversion 
d’énergie (et énergies renouvelables) par l’intermédiaire 
de la production et l’exploitation de l’hydrogène (et 
l’hydrogène vert) et de l’oxygène.
Originalité Production et stockage de l'hydrogène vert 
pour usage industriel et médical.
Activity Design, manufacture and sale of electrolyzers; 
Design, manufacture and sale of oxygen and hydrogen 
generating machines; Design, manufacture and sale of 
fuel cells; Design, manufacture and sale of renewable 
energy storage solutions; Installation service, assistance, 
training, and custom design of hydrogen and oxygen 
production and conversion systems.
Technological Aspect It consists in designing, manufacturing 
and selling all the components of energy conversion 
systems (and renewable energies) through the production 
and exploitation of hydrogen (and green hydrogen) and 
oxygen.
Originality Production and storage of green hydrogen for 
industrial and medical use.

EN

products.description: Generate and stabilize separated Hydrogen and Oxygen gases. Equipped with an automatic system for controlling pressure and temperature.

products.name: Hyo-Gnr 4000
products.description: Powered by photovoltaic panels. Generates and stabilizes a mixture of Hydrogen and Oxygen gases with automatic pressure and temperature control.

Our Story
Hyo-Tec is an industrial company. It is a Tunisian start-up based in Sfax Technopark. it was lunched as part of a research project elaborated by the Digital Research Center of Sfax and incubated by the TECHNORIAT program.
[Get to know us](https://hyo-tec.com/index.php/aboutus/)

Industrial Gases : Challenges…
Industries in various sectors such as metallurgy, chemistry, and manufacturing are increasingly facing challenges related to the use of traditional gases like acetylene, propane, or mixtures of air and natural gas. These challenges encompass several critical aspects:

#### High cost of traditional gases
Gases like acetylene, widely used in welding and cutting, are expensive →

#### Environmental impact and regulations
The use of fossil gases significantly →

#### Supply security and Dependence on Suppliers
Interruptions in the supply chain of →

#### Challenges of storage and waste management
Traditional gases require specific →

#### Energy efficiency and process quality
Traditional gases may not offer the →

#### Increased safety risks
Traditional gases like acetylene and propane are highly flammable and →
#### Autonomy and Supply Security
On-site production of your hydrogen and oxygen needs eliminates risks associated with supply chain interruptions, ensuring the continuity of your operations
#### Increased Precision and Efficiency in Processes
Our gases enhance energy efficiency in welding, cutting, and combustion processes, while also improving production quality and speed
#### Reduction of Emissions and Environmental Compliance
Hydrogen, as a clean fuel, and purified oxygen for combustion help minimize harmful emissions, ensuring compliance with environmental regulations
#### Why Choose Our Hydrogen and Oxygen Gas Solutions?
In a constantly evolving industrial environment, the challenges companies face require innovative and effective solutions. Our hydrogen and oxygen gas solutions emerge to directly address these various issues, offering safer, more economical, and environmentally friendly alternatives.
#### Reduction of Energy Costs
In the face of volatile fossil fuel prices, our solutions provide a more stable and economical energy production, thereby reducing operational costs
#### Optimization of Storage
Our gases can mitigate storage challenges by being produced on-site, thus reducing the need for large, hazardous tanks
#### Enhanced Security
Green hydrogen offers a safer alternative. Less flammable and less sensitive to shocks, it significantly reduces the risks of explosions, leaks, and industrial accidents
Hyo Products
Hyo-Tec is a pioneer in hydrogen technologies, offering advanced solutions for green hydrogen production, energy conversion, and storage.Our products cater to industries seeking sustainable alternatives, including metal processing and energy storage.With a focus on innovation and sustainability, we are driving the global transition to clean energy solutions.

tavily.answer: HyO-Tec is a Tunisian startup focused on hydrogen technologies, headquartered in Sfax. It aims to revolutionize industrial processes with sustainable hydrogen solutions. The company seeks to establish a subsidiary in Germany to expand its market reach.
